name: Chocolate Cola Cake (Star)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix flour and sugar; set aside.
2. In a saucepan, mix margarine, vegetable oil, cola, and cocoa. Bring the mixture to a boil.
3. Pour the boiling mixture immediately over the flour mixture. Add the remaining cake ingredients and mix thoroughly.
4. Pour the batter into a 9 x 13 inch greased pan.
5. Bake at 325°F for 40 minutes.
6. When the cake is almost done, begin making the icing by bringing margarine, cocoa, and cola to a boil.
7. Beat in powdered sugar until smooth.
8. Spread the icing on the warm cake while it is still slightly warm.
9. Allow the cake to cool before cutting into large squares.
10. Makes 12 servings.
